are_you_ok.title: Two mass shootings rock Minneapolis in 20 hours, 14 shot and 1 dead
are_you_ok.summary: Major violent crime event affecting broad local population's sense of safety, discrete acute incident.
are_you_ok.description: A violent Sunday in Minneapolis left fourteen people wounded and one man dead after two mass shootings just hours and blocks apart.

conversation_starters.title: Twin Cities gas prices rise to $3.93/gallon, could hit $4 within days
conversation_starters.summary: Twin Cities gas prices nearing $4 — local everyday-cost story people notice. You could open with: 'Gas is creeping toward $4 again — you commute far?'
conversation_starters.description: Gas prices are climbing again in the Twin Cities, and drivers are feeling the pinch at the pump.

you_should_know.title: Fire crews detect 3 new wildfires in northern MN; Boundary Waters remain closed
you_should_know.summary: Ongoing wildfire condition affecting northern MN, Boundary Waters closure - regional impact.
you_should_know.description: According to the U.S. Forest Service, more than 63,000 acres have burned in northern Minnesota, with another 8,400 crossing over into Canada.
